<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. To reach the goal at (7,7), a safe path is to go down along column 1 to row 7, then move right. Since I am facing right, I need to turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing down. The cell directly ahead (2,1) is a safe floor (`.`). Moving forward will keep me on a clear path straight down column 1, which leads to row 7 without encountering lava. From there I can later turn right to reach the goal. Any turn now would face me into lava or a wall, so moving forward is the only safe and direct option.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

</thought>
<action>
